caseStudy.label: Case Study
caseStudy.title: Fleet Intelligence Platform
caseStudy.subtitle: Real-Time Logistics Operations Dashboard
caseStudy.description: A modern fleet management platform designed to provide real-time visibility into transportation operations. The solution combines interactive maps, telemetry data, and operational analytics to help companies monitor assets and make faster decisions.

technologyEcosystem.description: We leverage industry-leading platforms and modern technologies to build secure, scalable, and intelligent solutions. From cloud infrastructure to artificial intelligence, we select the right tools to transform complex business challenges into reliable digital products.

microsoftCloud.description: We build enterprise-grade solutions using Microsoft's ecosystem, combining cloud infrastructure, application development, identity management, and modern DevOps practices.

errors.unsupportedFile: This file type is not supported. Use PDF, DOCX, XLSX, XLS, PNG, JPG or JPEG.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file exceeds the allowed size limit (15 MB documents, 30 MB images).
errors.payloadTooLarge: The processed file exceeds the local limit (~28 MB JSON).
errors.serverBodyRejected: The server rejected the request (413). Payload sent: ~{{sizeKb}} KB. Redeploy or restart UltraTechBack with DOCUMENT_JSON_LIMIT=32mb.
errors.preprocessFailed: The file could not be prepared for analysis.
errors.tooManyPages: The document exceeds the 8-page limit. Upload a shorter file to reduce processing cost.
errors.conversionFailed: The document could not be converted for analysis.
errors.backendTimeout: The analysis took too long. Please try again with a smaller document.
errors.aiError: The AI service could not analyze this document.
errors.networkError: Could not reach the analysis service. Check your connection.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong while analyzing the document.

showcase.title: AI Document Intelligence

processAutomation.title: Process Automation

legacyModernization.title: Legacy Modernization

cta.title: Let's Build Something Meaningful
cta.description: Every successful product begins with a conversation. Whether you're modernizing existing systems, exploring artificial intelligence, or building a completely new platform, we help organizations transform ambitious ideas into reliable digital solutions designed for long-term growth.

hero.subtitle: A curated exhibition of engineering excellence where architectural precision meets cognitive intelligence. We build the frameworks that define the next decade.

featured.title: Nexus_AI Core V2
featured.description: A high-performance legal document engine processing millions of contracts with 99.9% accuracy using custom-trained Large Language Models.

uptime.label: System Uptime

cloudEdge.title: Cloud Edge Mesh
cloudEdge.description: Distributed microservices orchestration layer optimized for ultra-low latency edge computing.

quantumShield.title: Quantum Shield VPN
quantumShield.description: Next-generation encryption protocols protecting enterprise data transit across public clusters.

standard.title: The Ultra Tech Standard
standard.description: Engineering isn't just about code—it's about measurable outcomes that define business survival.

hero.subtitle: Great software is not only built for today. We design scalable digital solutions that evolve with your organization, combining modern engineering practices, cloud technologies, and artificial intelligence to create lasting business value.
hero.closing: Software engineered for growth. Solutions designed for impact.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.statement: Our mission is to help organizations transform ideas into reliable digital solutions by combining thoughtful engineering, modern technologies, and a deep understanding of business challenges.
mission.statementSecondary: We believe technology should simplify complexity, create new opportunities, and help companies build a stronger future.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: Our vision is to create a future where technology becomes a strategic advantage for organizations, enabling businesses to operate smarter, adapt faster, and grow through intelligent and scalable digital solutions.

evolution.title: The Ultra Tech Evolution
evolution.subtitle: Tracing our trajectory from a boutique agency to a global tech powerhouse.

origin.title: Origin
origin.description: Founded in Silicon Valley with a focus on cloud-native architecture for high-growth startups.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Expanded to EMEA, securing partnerships with three Fortune 500 financial institutions.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Launched Ultra Tech AI labs, integrating generative models into predictive scaling engines.

horizon.title: Horizon
horizon.description: Pioneering edge-computing solutions for decentralized industrial infrastructure.

principles.title: Engineering Principles
principles.subtitle: We believe great software is built through thoughtful decisions, strong engineering practices, and a continuous commitment to creating solutions that deliver real value.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We focus on building reliable solutions where every technical decision has a purpose. Clean architecture, maintainable code, and attention to detail are the foundation of everything we create.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Technology is constantly evolving. We explore modern tools and approaches to create smarter solutions while choosing the right technology for each business challenge.

scale.title: Built to Scale
scale.description: Successful solutions must grow with the organizations they support. We design systems with flexibility, performance, and future expansion in mind.

architects.title: The Architects
architects.subtitle: A collective of senior engineers, designers, and strategists.

inquiry.label: Start a Conversation
inquiry.title: Let's Build Something Together
inquiry.description: Have a project in mind or a technical challenge to solve? Tell us about your goals, and our team will help you explore the right software, cloud, and AI solutions to bring your ideas to life.

email.label: Email
email.description: Reach out to discuss your project, requirements, or technical challenges.

consultation.label: Project Consultation
consultation.description: Share your objectives and explore how technology can help your business grow.

responseTime.label: Response Time
responseTime.description: Our team will review your request and get back to you shortly.

projectDuration.question: How long does a typical project take?
projectDuration.answer: Every project is different. After understanding your goals and technical requirements, we define a realistic roadmap. Smaller solutions can be delivered in weeks, while larger platforms usually require a phased approach to ensure quality and scalability.

modernizeSystems.question: Can you modernize existing systems?
modernizeSystems.answer: Yes. We help organizations improve and evolve existing software by modernizing outdated architectures, improving performance, and integrating modern technologies without disrupting critical operations.

security.question: How do you approach security?
security.answer: Security is considered from the beginning of every project. We apply modern practices around authentication, data protection, infrastructure, and application architecture to build reliable solutions.

existingTeams.question: Do you work with existing teams?
existingTeams.answer: Absolutely. We can collaborate with internal development teams, support existing engineering efforts, or provide a complete solution from architecture to implementation.

form.title: Project Inquiry
